title: FMD - Both earbuds connected
scenario: Verify that when both earbuds are connected, the Osprey device is recognized on the map as a single device in the Find My Device feature.
steps: Open Lens app with Osprey device connected.
Tap on App Settings icon (hamburger icon).
expected: Osprey device is recognized on the map as one device. Tern device is also recognized on the map as one device.
